title: Schnella grazielae
taxonomy: Schnella grazielae is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants, typically trees, for support. Schnella grazielae is native to Brazil, where it can be found in the wild. The classification of Schnella grazielae includes its genus, which is also named Schnella, and its family, Orchidaceae. Further classification within the family would include its subfamily, tribe, and possibly other taxonomic ranks, but this information is not readily available.
